---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve, or what commissioning workflow does it improve?
Describe the current limitation.

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Affected area

- [ ] Frontend (`frontend/`)
- [ ] Backend API (`backend/`)
- [ ] Worker (`worker/`)
- [ ] Core (`core/`)
- [ ] Infra / Docker (`infra/`)
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Other / not sure

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you did not choose them.

## Scope and safety considerations

<!--
Note anything touching scan-safety (active network scanning), secret handling,
auth, or a live-infrastructure path (MQTT broker, Postgres, Docker, edge→hub
sync). See docs/security-posture.md and docs/phase5-onsite-validation.md.
-->

## Additional context

Mockups, spec references, or related issues.
